summary: Comprehensive frontend E2E testing of Angular 17 Visual XSL-FO Studio at https://visual-xsl-fo.preview.emergentagent.com. All 24 requested feature groups verified end-to-end via Playwright: 3-panel layout render, page presets (A4/A5/A6/Letter/Legal), unit selector (pt/mm/cm/in), background upload/rename/clear, add text (static + dynamic <xsl:value-of>), typography updates propagating to XML, X/Y position updates, drag on canvas, resize handles, double-click inline edit, add image with confirm dialog, image src modes (placeholder/file/base64), image scaling toggle, undo/redo (button + Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z), Delete key removes element, grid toggle, rulers toggle, zoom in/out/reset, multi-page add/switch/remove, templates save/load/delete, Export/Import JSON, New document, XML Copy (headless clipboard denies gracefully with error toast), Download .xsl, localStorage persistence across reload. Downloaded .xsl file confirmed to have full XSL-FO 1.0 structure (<?xml> decl, fo:root with fo+xsl namespaces, fo:layout-master-set, fo:simple-page-master with page-width/height in pt, fo:page-sequence, fo:flow, absolute-positioned block-containers). No crashes, no console errors, no pageerror events. App is production-ready.

issues: In headless browsers without clipboard permission grant, copyXml shows 'Copy failed — select text manually' error toast. This is graceful and matches spec expectation. In real browsers with permission it succeeds. No fix needed.

critical_code_review_comments: xsl-fo-generator.service.ts line 34: Background block is always emitted when `page.backgroundDataUrl || page.backgroundPlaceholder` is truthy. Since default backgroundPlaceholder='backgroundImage', the XML will always contain a <fo:external-graphic src='{backgroundImage}'/> block even for pages the user never touched. Consider gating this on backgroundDataUrl only, or add an explicit user opt-in for the background variable, to avoid surprising empty pages with a background <fo:external-graphic> src='{backgroundImage}' referencing a variable that may not exist at render time.

xsl-fo-generator.service.ts line 82: Static text is emitted as <xsl:text>...</xsl:text> inside <fo:block>. This only produces output when the .xsl file is passed through an XSLT engine before FO rendering (which is a common two-step pipeline). If users expect direct FO consumption (e.g. Apache FOP applied to the .xsl directly), the static branch should emit the text as a child text node inside <fo:block> instead of wrapping it in <xsl:text>. Consider making this configurable or documenting the assumed pipeline in the UI.

editor.store.ts loadTemplate (line 300): pushes a mutate() that overrides state without deep-cloning the template. If a user loads the same template twice and edits, the shared elements references could be mutated via patch (updateElement uses spread so it is currently safe, but this is fragile). Consider JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(t.state)) for safety.

editor.store.ts autosave effect (line 71): writes to localStorage on every state change including transient drag/resize (recordHistory=false) mutations. On rapid drag, this can call localStorage.setItem 100+ times per second. Consider debouncing autosave (e.g. 200ms) for performance.

canvas.component.ts onElementMouseDown: relies on window mousemove listener even when nothing is being dragged — fine but consider passive listener and only attaching on mousedown for lower CPU on idle canvas.

xml-preview.component.ts ngAfterViewInit stubs MonacoEnvironment.getWorker with a no-op worker. This disables Monaco's XML tokenization worker but still works for basic syntax highlighting via the main thread — acceptable for this MVP but XML validation/formatting features are limited.

All 8 resize handles are always rendered when selected — good; drag+resize update state with recordHistory=false during move and commit a snapshot on mouseup — undo works correctly at the operation boundary.
seed_data_creation: None — localStorage cleared before each test run to guarantee a fresh initial state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Angular 17 SPA, no backend. Public URL https://visual-xsl-fo.preview.emergentagent.com. All state persists in localStorage under keys 'xslfo-studio:current-doc' and 'xslfo-studio:templates'. Clear these to reset. window.monaco global is NOT exposed — read XML via download or via the .view-line elements inside [data-testid='xml-monaco'] (note: Monaco virtualizes lines so long XML may be partially in DOM). Best way to assert XML content is to trigger the Download .xsl button and read the blob. Add Image and New Document trigger window.confirm — must attach page.on('dialog', accept). Copy XML depends on clipboard permission — grant via BrowserContext.grant_permissions(['clipboard-write']) for real success testing.
